overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character ascends stairs from an underpass into a plaza with digital billboards, then emerges onto a busy street with futuristic vehicles and towering buildings covered in advertisements. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a concrete staircase beneath an urban overpass. The environment is enclosed with green metal railings and illuminated by artificial pink lighting from above. The stairs lead upward toward a visible plaza area with vegetation.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian plaza beneath the overpass, surrounded by large planters with tropical vegetation illuminated by green neon lights. Digital billboards display bright pink advertisements overhead while a few pedestrians sit on integrated concrete benches. The space feels like a transitional zone between the stairs and the open street.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered plaza into an open urban environment, the scene reveals a dramatic cyberpunk cityscape with a distinctive tall red cylindrical building dominating the view. Steam rises from street vents as the camera approaches a busy intersection with futuristic skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy downtown sidewalk at street level, passing graffiti-covered walls and active steam vents. The street features moderate traffic with distinctive green taxis and orange trucks passing by. Neon billboards illuminate the scene while the tall red building remains visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along a commercial street with mixed architectural styles, featuring both traditional Asian roof elements and modern glass facades. The sidewalk is lined with decorated trees and storefronts with neon signage. More pedestrians are visible, and the distinctive red building from earlier segments remains visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a confined urban underpass into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a cyberpunk downtown. It begins with a climb up concrete stairs framed by green railings and bathed in artificial pink light, moving upward toward a glimpse of greenery. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a covered pedestrian plaza where tropical plants glow under green neon and bright pink digital billboards hang overhead. The view then expands dramatically as the camera emerges from the plaza into the open city, revealing a towering red cylindrical building and steam rising from street vents at a busy intersection. Finally, the movement continues along a vibrant commercial sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls and futuristic traffic, passing a blend of traditional Asian architecture and modern glass facades under the glow of endless neon signage.
